_publications._publicationTitle: MAF mediates crosstalk between Ras-MAPK and mTOR signaling in NF1.

_contextSnippet: RT-PCR revealed upregulation of glial lineage markers S100β, MBP, and BLBP in MPNST cells after transduction with MAF
details: Upregulated glial lineage markers S100β, MBP, and BLBP in MPNST cells and decreased SOX9 mRNA and protein expression
